message:
fix(rowid,planner,codegen): harden rowid alias resolution against shadowed columns, expression-index planner directives, hidden rowid in GROUP BY

Rowid alias resolution hardened against shadowed columns:
- column_ref_matches_table_rowid and callers now receive full
  TableSchema, not just the table label
- New table_exposes_hidden_rowid_alias() checks whether names like
  rowid/_rowid_/oid actually refer to the hidden rowid or to a
  user-declared column with that same name (e.g., rowid TEXT)
- rewrite_rowid_aliases_in_expr similarly guarded
- Propagated through rowid lookup, range scan, fast-path, join,
  and GROUP BY paths
- ~15 new tests cover tables with visible rowid columns alongside
  IPK or plain rowid tables

Expression-index support in planner directives and codegen:
- SelectPlannerDirective replaced index_column with richer fields:
  index_key_label, index_key_is_expression, index_equality_target (Expr),
  index_range_target (PlannerIndexRangeTarget with lower/upper bounds)
- New PlannerIndexRangeBound and PlannerIndexRangeTarget structs
- Planner and codegen paths now detect expression indexes (e.g.
  lower(name)), extract equality/range probe targets from WHERE clauses,
  validate against directive expectations, emit appropriate VDBE bytecode
- EXPLAIN output shows <expr> for expression indexes
- Tests validate expression-index equality, range, and EQP output

Hidden rowid materialization in GROUP BY / window / raw scan:
- GROUP BY join path materializes hidden rowid column into col_map
  and raw scan SELECT when table exposes hidden rowid
- mem-scan GROUP BY helper gains include_hidden_rowid parameter
- Fixes queries like SELECT t.rowid, COUNT(*) FROM t GROUP BY t.rowid

ORDER BY alias resolution refactored:
- Three duplicate implementations consolidated into
  resolve_order_by_output_expr with alias-to-output-expression
  resolution and infinite recursion guard

Minor cleanups:
- write_json_table_column return type simplified to () (infallible)
- Import reordering in vacuum.rs
- Skip-scan IN-list probe count guard tightened

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
